overall.description: A static elevated view of a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection from a video game, likely Cyberpunk 2077. Vehicles flow continuously along multi-level roads beneath towering modern glass skyscrapers and elevated transit structures on an overcast day.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking multi-level urban intersection

agents.ego_description: standing still on an elevated glass walkway, observing the traffic flow and cityscape below

entered.detail: tall industrial tower with orange US signage and construction crane elements
multi-level highway and monorail track structure with glass and steel construction
transparent glass and metal railing of the pedestrian walkway in the immediate foreground
group of palm trees lining the left side of the street below
complex road junction with multiple lanes and levels of traffic flow

segments.scene_description: From a fixed elevated vantage point on a glass walkway, the view overlooks a bustling futuristic intersection in a cyberpunk city. The US tower dominates the left skyline while elevated highways crisscross the right side. Vehicles move continuously along the multi-level roads below, with palm trees visible along the street edges. The overcast sky provides diffused natural lighting over the modern glass and steel architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed elevated perspective over a bustling cyberpunk intersection, capturing the scale of a futuristic metropolis under a muted sky. It begins from a glass walkway, overlooking a dense network of multi-level roads where vehicles flow continuously beneath towering glass and steel architecture. As the view settles, the US tower dominates the left skyline while elevated highways crisscross the right side of the frame. The scene remains anchored in this high vantage point, highlighting the contrast between the organic palm trees lining the street edges and the rigid, modern geometry of the city under diffused, overcast lighting.
